name: Chicken Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
2. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add Italian seasoning and cook for another minute.
4. Brown the chicken on both sides until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. In a crockpot, combine tomato soup, water, and bay leaf.
6. Place the cooked chicken in the crockpot and pour over the tomato sauce.
7. Cover and cook on HIGH for 3 to 4 hours or LOW for 6 to 8 hours until the chicken is tender.
8. Remove the chicken from the crockpot and transfer it to a serving dish.
9. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella and grated Parmesan cheese.
10. Place the dish in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 5-7 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
11. Serve hot over rice or noodles.
